title: good_worker
description:
I was constrained by the limitations of the original workbench, so this mod was born. 
This mod serves the Infinite Template modpack.
body:
This mod serves the Infinite Template modpack.

It adds the following features:

- Configurable fluid amount and types for the Create mod's Basin – You can adjust how much fluid the basin can hold and which fluids are allowed.

- Prevents mobs from dropping equipment – Mobs will no longer drop armor or weapons they are wearing. This behavior is also configurable, so you can enable or disable it as you like.
